items.message: Office hours for this week have been moved to Thursday 3-5 PM due to a department meeting. Please book slots via the portal.

items.title: ⚠️ Assignment Extension
items.message: Due to popular request, the Week 2 assignment deadline has been extended to April 3rd. Use the extra time to optimize your solutions!

items.title: 📝 Midterm Exam Info
items.message: Midterm exam will cover Weeks 1-4. Date: April 15th, 10 AM - 12 PM in Main Hall. Review session on April 13th during lecture.

items.title: 📊 Practice Problems Released
items.message: Additional practice problems for trees are now available in the resources section. Solutions will be discussed in next week's tutorial.

items.title: 🎓 Guest Lecture: Advanced Sorting Techniques
items.message: Dr. Johnson from Google will give a guest lecture on parallel sorting algorithms and their applications in big data systems this Friday at 3 PM.
